title: HIAL recognised for Health & Safety Promotion work

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Highlands and Islands Airports Ltd (HIAL) has received a Highly Commended award in the Small Airport Category for its efforts during the 2025 Airports UK Health & Safety Week. This accolade highlights the company's commitment to promoting health and safety standards within the aviation sector.

HIAL airports connect communities across the Highlands and Islands, where aviation has played a vital role since the inter-war period. The recognition underscores the importance of prioritising safety in maintaining connectivity and supporting local economies.
